display_text: Introducing Golden Horizon Pilsner, a crisp and refreshing beer crafted for everyday enjoyment. This classic Pilsner boasts a light golden color and a clean, bright flavor profile. Expect subtle citrus notes from carefully selected hops, balanced by a gentle bitterness and a dry finish. With an ABV of 4.8% and 35 IBUs, it's easy-drinking and incredibly satisfying. Brewed with simple, quality ingredients and priced at $9 for a 6-pack, Golden Horizon Pilsner is the perfect choice for a sunny afternoon or a casual gathering.

Introducing Midnight Bloom Stout, a rich and decadent dark beer perfect for savoring. This full-bodied Stout boasts a deep, dark color and an ABV of 7.5%. Expect a complex flavor profile with notes of roasted malt complemented by a subtle sweetness and creamy mouthfeel thanks to the addition of lactose. With a moderate bitterness and a pleasant aroma, Midnight Bloom offers a balanced and satisfying experience. It’s a robust choice for those who appreciate a full-flavored, indulgent beer. A six-pack is priced at $15.

Introducing Crimson Orchard Sour, a refreshingly tart and vibrant beer. This Sour style ale boasts a beautiful ruby hue and a balanced flavor profile. Expect a crisp acidity complemented by subtle sweetness and a light body, making it incredibly easy to drink. We’ve added real fruit for a burst of natural flavor and aroma. With a moderate 5.2% ABV and just 10 IBUs, it's a perfect choice for those seeking a unique and approachable beer experience. A six-pack is priced at $18.

Introducing Sunstone Wheat Ale, a refreshing and easy-drinking beer perfect for any occasion. This Wheat style ale boasts a light golden color and a subtle malt sweetness balanced by a bright citrus hop aroma. With a moderate bitterness and a clean finish, Sunstone offers a crisp and approachable flavor profile. At 5.5% ABV and 20 IBUs, it’s a wonderfully balanced brew. Enjoy a six-pack for just $8 and experience the sunshine in every sip!

Emberglow Porter is a rich and full-bodied dark beer, perfect for savoring. This Porter boasts a deep, dark color and a complex flavor profile with notes of roasted malt and a subtle sweetness. Aged in oak barrels, it offers a smooth, mellow character with a balanced bitterness. Expect a medium-full body and a pleasant aroma. With an ABV of 6.0% and 28 IBUs, it's a satisfying choice for those who appreciate a robust and flavorful beer. A six-pack is priced at $12.
